name: JobSpy MCP Server
what_it_does: JobSpy MCP server enabling AI agents to search job listings across multiple platforms — scraping LinkedIn, Indeed, Glassdoor, and ZipRecruiter for job postings, filtering by role, location, salary, and experience level, and integrating multi-platform job search into agent-driven career management and recruiting automation workflows.
use_cases: Searching job listings across multiple platforms from career advisor agents
Finding matching roles based on skills and preferences from job matching agents
Monitoring new job postings for specific roles from job alert agents
Aggregating salary data from multiple job boards from compensation research agents
Building job recommendation pipelines from career development agents
Automating job application sourcing from recruiting workflow agents
not_for: Official API access (JobSpy uses scraping — may violate LinkedIn/Indeed ToS)
High-volume automated job applications (against platform ToS)
Teams in regions where LinkedIn/Indeed aren't primary job markets
best_when: A job seeker or recruiter needs aggregated job listings from multiple platforms — searching LinkedIn, Indeed, and Glassdoor simultaneously without separate API keys.
avoid_when: You need guaranteed uptime or official API access — JobSpy's scraping approach may break with platform changes and may violate ToS.

auth.notes: No authentication required — JobSpy scrapes public job listings. LinkedIn may require cookies for some searches. No official API keys needed.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Completely free — scrapes public job listings
pricing.notes: JobSpy library is free open source. Community MCP is free. Scraping job platforms — use responsibly and comply with platform ToS.

performance.rate_limits: Platform-enforced scraping limits; respect rate limits to avoid blocks

known_agent_gotchas: Scraping approach — may violate LinkedIn/Indeed ToS; use at your own risk
Search results depend on scraping reliability — platform changes can break JobSpy
Slow searches (2-10 seconds) as it scrapes multiple sites — add appropriate timeouts
LinkedIn searches may be limited without login cookies
Community MCP wrapping JobSpy library — double layer of maintenance dependency
Location-based searches work best with exact city/state — imprecise locations reduce results
agent_readiness.security_notes: No API keys. Scraping approach — ToS compliance risk on LinkedIn/Indeed. HTTPS. Community MCP. Use for personal job search, not high-volume automated scraping.

security_score_components.security_notes: Scraping — ToS risk. HTTPS. No credentials. Community MCP. Personal use only — avoid high-volume automation.
